_patch_meta.description: Session B analytical write-backs for grace (reg 068): god_as_subject and somatic_link corrections on wa_term_inventory, sb_classification, H2603B deletion, research flags. V2 corrects V1 table routing error — OP-001 to OP-010 now correctly target wa_term_inventory (not mti_terms).

operations.description: G5485 charis (term_inv_id 927) — god_as_subject corrected to 1: God named agent in majority of anchor verses (Eph 2:8, 2Cor 12:9, Rom 3:24, Gal 1:15, 1Cor 15:10). Data gap confirmed Session B Pass 2.
G5483 charizō (term_inv_id 5584) — god_as_subject corrected to 1: Rom 8:32, 1Cor 2:12, Act 27:24, Gal 3:18 — God explicit subject of the grace-giving act.
G5487 charitoō (term_inv_id 5585) — god_as_subject corrected to 1: both NT occurrences (Luk 1:28, Eph 1:6) have God as agent.
H2580 chen (term_inv_id 928) — god_as_subject corrected to 1: 27 verses with divine reference; 'find favour in the eyes of the Lord' formula pervasive.
H2587 channun (term_inv_id 5589) — god_as_subject corrected to 1: all 13 occurrences in registry are divine character descriptions (Exo 34:6 formula and parallels).
H2603A chanan (term_inv_id 5586) — god_as_subject corrected to 1: 43 verses with divine reference; 'Be gracious to me, O Lord' dominant prayer form.
H2580 chen (term_inv_id 928) — somatic_link set to 1: eyes/sight idiom pervasive (28 somatic verses); face prominent (Exo 33:16, Num 6:25, Rut 2:10).
H2603A chanan (term_inv_id 5586) — somatic_link set to 1: 24 somatic verses — prostration/kneeling (2Ki 1:13, Est 8:3), face (Num 6:25), heart (1Ki 8:47, Psa 119:58), bones (Psa 6:2).
H8469 tachanum (term_inv_id 929) — somatic_link set to 1: 7 somatic verses — fasting, sackcloth, ashes, face (Dan 9:3); weeping (Jer 3:21, 31:9); raised hands (Psa 28:2); spirit (Zec 12:10).
H8467 techinnah (term_inv_id 5588) — somatic_link set to 1: 8 somatic verses — hands stretched out (1Ki 8:38, 54; 2Ch 6:29), eyes (1Ki 8:52, 9:3), heart (1Ki 8:38, 9:3).

set.status_note: Phantom entry — no genuine verse occurrences. STEP data confirms all 72 verses fetched under H2603B resolve at span level to H2603A (span_code_found = H2603A in all 72 cases). H2603B is a theoretical lexicographical distinction with no recoverable textual presence in the STEP-tagged corpus. Deleted Session B 2026-04-09.
set.exclusion_reason: No corpus evidence — all span matches resolve to H2603A

operations.description: H2603B chanan (be loathsome) — status → delete. STEP analysis confirms zero genuine H2603B span hits; all 72 verses resolve to H2603A.

set.sb_classification_reasoning: Grace originates at the spirit level — it is the freely given disposition of God toward humanity, received as a gift from above, not self-generated. Its structure as gift requires an outside source. At the soul level grace is thoroughly expressed: the desire for it, the fear of being without it, the experience of finding it, and the transformed inner disposition of the one formed by it are all soulish states — personally felt, emotionally coloured, relationally constituted. Somatic evidence (prostration, weeping, raised hands, fasting, gracious speech) confirms that grace is enacted through the body without originating there. Body enacts and externalises what is happening at the spirit-soul level. Confidence: high — pattern consistent across 194 active verses and all nine owner terms.

operations.description: Registry 068 grace — sb_classification set to Spirit-soul interface; session_b_status advanced to Analysis Complete.

record.description: Grace-Forgiveness formal connection: G5483 charizō carries both 'give grace' and 'forgive/cancel debt' as primary senses. Eph 4:32 makes forgiveness the named expression of grace received. The grace-forgiveness relationship is formally embedded in the Greek term itself. Requires cross-registry analysis when forgiveness registry is complete.

operations.description: Research flag PH2-068-001: Grace-Forgiveness formal connection via G5483 charizō

record.description: Grace-Chesed boundary question: H2580 chen and chesed (steadfast love) travel together in OT formulas. Key structural question: does chen name the inner disposition of which chesed is the sustained relational expression? Cannot be resolved within this registry.

operations.description: Research flag PH2-068-002: Grace-Chesed boundary question

record.description: Grace-Repentance sequence: Zec 12:10 (H8469 anchor) and Joel 2:13 (H2587) establish that grace precedes and enables the turn — the capacity to repent is itself given as grace. Directional sequence requires confirmation against repentance registry data.

Grace-Identity formation signal: 1Cor 15:10 — 'by the grace of God I am what I am' — strongest statement in corpus of grace as identity-constituting. Connects to identity-formation vocabulary. Flag for cross-registry investigation.

operations.description: Research flag PH2-068-004: Grace-Identity formation signal

record.description: Grace-Lament connection: weeping-supplication complex (tachanum + weeping in Jer 3:21, 31:9; Zec 12:10; Est 8:3; Dan 9:3) connects grace-seeking posture to the lament tradition. Warrants investigation when lament vocabulary is processed.

operations.description: Research flag PH2-068-005: Grace-Lament connection via weeping-supplication complex

Session B analytical brief: wa-068-grace-session-b-brief-2026-04-09.md. Session C v2: wa-068-grace-word-study-v2-2026-04-09.md (Section 3 and 4 annotations incorporated). V2 patch supersedes V1 — OP-001 to OP-010 retargeted from mti_terms to wa_term_inventory.

_patch_summary.v1_error: OP-001 to OP-010 targeted mti_terms; god_as_subject and somatic_link exist on wa_term_inventory. Corrected in V2.
_patch_summary.notes: H8469 and H8467 god_as_subject retained at 0 — supplication terms, God is addressee not agent. H2603B deleted — zero genuine corpus span hits.
